author: lOrm
content: #658 closed. Added PluginDelistingJob in src/services/background.rs alongside PluginAutoupdateJob. Constructor takes (plugin_id, source) snapshot; tick emits plugin_delisting_check structured events per plugin. Same scheduling-slot Phase 1 pattern as #652 — runtime marketplace polling + auto-uninstall semantics are the follow-up. 2 unit tests cover empty list + object safety.
